data.content: Implementation complete on branch feat/ab20-persist-create-form (commit 90b8fe9ceed6). Changes: (1) New src/lib/create-draft.ts with localStorage-backed get/persist/clear helpers using foolery:createBeatDraft key. (2) Modified src/components/beat-form.tsx: useBeatForm reads saved draft on mount for initial form values and relationship state; useDraftPersistence hook subscribes to form.watch and relationship array changes to persist on every input change; handleClear resets form to defaults, clears relationships, and removes draft from storage; handleFormSubmit and handleCreateMoreClick both call clearCreateBeatDraft before delegating to parent callbacks; Clear button rendered in footer (left-aligned, outline variant) only in create mode. (3) Extracted FormField to src/components/form-field.tsx and ProfileInfoDialog to src/components/profile-info-dialog.tsx to keep beat-form.tsx under 500-line limit. (4) 12 contract tests in src/lib/__tests__/create-draft-persistence-contract.test.ts covering helper API, SSR guards, draft restore, persistence wiring, clear behavior, and submit cleanup. All quality gates pass: lint clean, tsc --noEmit clean, 200 test files / 2325 tests pass, build succeeds.
